errors.broker_unreachable: MQTT broker unreachable. Repair the device to update broker settings.
errors.settings_apply_failed: Could not apply settings. Check that the device is online.
errors.flow_alarm_eth_unavailable: Ethernet status is not available on this device.
errors.flow_alarm_wifi_unavailable: Wi-Fi status is not available on this device.
errors.flow_ac_socket_unavailable: AC Socket is not available on this device.
errors.flow_battery_settings_unavailable: Battery settings are not available on this device.
errors.auto_standby_not_allowed: Enable auto standby should be allowed before setting standby mode.

intro.title: MQTT
intro.subtitle: Local connection via MQTT
intro.body:
This device connects via MQTT.

First set up an MQTT broker, then connect your Jackery SolarVault 3 to it in the mobile Jackery app.

When that's done, continue here.

connection.title: Broker details
connection.subtitle: Please provide the details of the MQTT broker your Jackery SolarVault 3 is connected to.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.subtitle: Your device needs credentials to connect with Homey.
credentials.serial_required: Please enter the device serial number.

list_devices.no_config: Broker configuration missing. Please go back and complete the broker step.
list_devices.no_credentials: Device token missing. Please go back and complete the credentials step.
list_devices.no_devices: No Jackery devices found. Check broker, token, and serial number.

repair.subtitle: Update broker connection and device token
repair.device_not_found: Could not find this device on the broker. Check broker settings and that the battery is online.
